phase_6_closeout.summary: All 6 plans (06-01..06-06) have SUMMARY.md. 06-UAT.md shows 9/9 (Test 7 has a documented q.notify caveat — the digest rewrite is direct evidence; the publish is just slow on cold oMLX).

completed_tasks.name: render_brief regression fix (digest.line() `or` short-circuit dropped title/score)
View-filter pipeline + TESSOC taxonomy (ADR-010) + ADRs + UAT scripts
Phase 6 UAT closure — 4 UAT scripts (uat_test4/5/7/9) + 06-UAT.md updated to 9/9

decisions.decision: pgvector HNSW greedy centroid clustering per CCIR section
decisions.rationale: Replaces keyword-overlap fallback; semantic similarity via mE5-large embeddings
Full entity resolution deferred to Phase 8; interim heuristic sufficient for UAT

decisions.decision: Test-DSN pattern: INFOTRIAGE_TEST_DSN only, no fallback
decisions.rationale: Prevents prod DB wipe; guard test enforces

decisions.decision: threshold config: CLUSTER_THRESHOLD env var (0.0-1.0), default 0.75
decisions.rationale: Configurable threshold for clustering; validated in main.py

decisions.decision: View filters: COP/CIP/CRP (ADR-012); COP=operational/friendly, CIP=adversary/threat, CRP=user-configurable
decisions.rationale: Output lenses — don't change the LLM scorer, just render subsets

decisions.decision: TESSOC taxonomy: UK/NATO JDP 2-00 threat-actor frame (Terror/Espionage/Subversion/Sabotage/Organized Crime)
render_brief inline format (drop digest.line() which short-circuited title/score when why was truthy)
decisions.rationale: CAT_II/ROUTINE items were rendering `- <why>  [les](url)` with no title or score

decisions.decision: views.py:_normalize actually title-cases (was docstring-only); _matches_cip adds .upper() on ccir
decisions.rationale: Lowercase pmesii from seed_sample_data.py was failing case-sensitive _CIP_PMESII set membership; .title() corrupted 'PIR-1' → 'Pir-1' so ccir needed .upper() to undo it

decisions.decision: M1 ship-gate single 07-01 plan covers structured logging + DLQ consumer + ops Makefile + retire host scripts
decisions.rationale: Consolidates original 07-02/07-03/07-04 into one executable plan; the original 07-01 (FreshRSS ops) is already done

prerequisite_commits.purpose: render_brief regression fix — prevent digest.line() short-circuit from dropping title/score
View-filter pipeline + TESSOC taxonomy (ADR-010) + 5 ADRs + UAT script seeds
Phase 6 UAT closure — 4 live UAT scripts + 06-UAT.md updated to 9/9

next_action: Phase 7 07-01 entry conditions satisfied: all prerequisite_commits landed and Phase 6 is closed at 9/9 UAT. Begin Phase 7 07-01 (M1 ship-gate ops) per .planning/phases/07-ops-cutover/07-01-PLAN.md. NOTE: do NOT skip or reorder prerequisite_commits — they are the closed-out Phase 6 baseline. Suggested task order: Task 1 (retire host scripts — smallest/cheapest first) → Task 2 (structured logging — partly wired in commit edbf283, extend to remaining services) → Task 3 (ops/Makefile) → Task 4 (DLQ consumer — touches live RabbitMQ, do last). Original order in next_action draft was Task 4 → Task 1 → Task 3 → Task 2; revised to smallest-first.
context_notes: Phase 6 fully closed. Renderer regression fix in apps/brief/renderer.py (commit 07df0d9) prevents digest.line() from short-circuiting title/score. View-filter pipeline + TESSOC taxonomy (ADR-010) + 5 ADRs in commit ddf2a04. 4 UAT scripts run live green (uat_test4 vault, uat_test5 email, uat_test7 event-driven, uat_test9 threshold env) with Test 7's q.notify check documented as 'slow but wiring correct' (the live consumer cycle is 90–360s due to 18 LLM calls for BLUF synthesis). Phase 7 is queued: 07-01 covers M1 ship-gate work. After 07-01 lands, the stack is at parity with the spike and ready for M1 ship.

critical_anti_patterns.pattern: Writing SUMMARY before verifying artifacts on disk
critical_anti_patterns.description: 06-01 SUMMARY claimed deliverables not on disk
critical_anti_patterns.prevention: git status + ls first; never trust agent output
Test monkey-patch in isolation before integrating
Calibrate on held-out corpus; log merge decisions

critical_anti_patterns.description: sab_html.cluster called directly, not via module
critical_anti_patterns.prevention: Modify module function, not local reference

critical_anti_patterns.description: drops title/score when why is truthy
str.title() corrupts 'PIR-1' → 'Pir-1' (capitalizes first letter, lowercases rest); _matches_cip needs .upper() on ccir like _matches_cop does
critical_anti_patterns.prevention: Always use the pattern ccir = _normalize(row.get('ccir')).upper() when checking against uppercase sets or doing startswith on uppercase prefixes
